name: TA-65
summary: Astragalus-derived telomerase activator product with human telomere-length and immune-biomarker studies plus preclinical short-telomere mouse evidence.
mechanism_summary: Reported telomerase-activating product intended to affect telomere biology, most directly represented by leukocyte telomere-length and immune-biomarker endpoints.

open_questions: Whether telomere-length changes translate into functional or disease benefit
Whether effects replicate independently with clear dose response and safety boundaries
